issues.sample: The brake pads installed by Lexus squeak as if they need to be replaced. According to the Lexus dealer there is a service bulletin, and the fix is to replace the bad pads. I was told the brakes are fine and that the squeaking doesn't mean anything.

narrative.headline: What 2018 Lexus Rc owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 1 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Service Brakes (100% of reports).

issues.sample: The brake pads installed by Lexus squeak as if they need to be replaced. According to the Lexus dealer there is a service bulletin, and the fix is to replace the bad pads. I was told the brakes are fine and that the squeaking doesn't mean anything.
issues.title: Service Brakes
